summary: Lead accepts M6-TASK-GRAPH-001 for integration after systems_architect REVIEW and independent qa_reviewer ACCEPT. The accepted graph is planning-only, covers M6 Alpha system-complete scope, exposes M6-ALPHA-SYSTEM-CONTRACT-001 as the first downstream READY task, leaves all other downstream M6 tasks DRAFT, and preserves DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE with no implementation or blocking spike/research task.

tests_run.result: M6-TASK-GRAPH-001 is REVIEW at QA review time; M6-ALPHA-SYSTEM-CONTRACT-001 is READY; other downstream M6 tasks are DRAFT.
No dependency-ready task while M6-TASK-GRAPH-001 remained in REVIEW before lead acceptance.
M6 DAG validation passed: 15 files, graph REVIEW before lead acceptance, one READY downstream task, 13 DRAFT downstream tasks, no cycles.
Authored paths stay within allowed M6 task/status/message paths; pre-existing ui-samples/ ignored and untouched.

decisions: Accept the M6 task graph for PR integration.
Do not start M6-ALPHA-SYSTEM-CONTRACT-001 until this graph enters main, CI passes, main syncs, and M6-TASK-GRAPH-001 is CLOSED.
Preserve DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE exactly: no manual node battle implementation task and no blocking M6/M7/M8 spike or research task.
risks: M6 is broad; downstream R4 tasks must be reviewed independently before implementation enters main.
This acceptance covers the graph only, not future implementation correctness.
Pre-existing untracked ui-samples/ remains outside this task.
requested_action: Open PR for the accepted M6 task graph. If CI passes, merge, sync main, close M6-TASK-GRAPH-001, then start M6-ALPHA-SYSTEM-CONTRACT-001.
